name: AD Mixtape · Abstract Truths: An Evolving Jazz Compendium — Volume Five
description: Volume five of Abstract Truths. If unfamiliar with the series, please first read here about the its genesis and intention. Bringing us this look at the contemporary Chicago jazz scene is Scottie McNiece, head of the essential International Anthem Recording Co.
